label: 第181話
source_locator: 単行本21巻 目次 p.7
summary_short: 仙台結界の戦いを終えた乙骨は、石流と烏鷺を殺さず得点を譲り受け、合計190点を得る。一方、東京第2結界では秤が漫画家志望のシャルル・ベルナールと出会う。
summary_full: 仙台結界の戦闘後、乙骨は烏鷺と石流を生かし、追加総則による得点譲渡で合計190点を確保する。烏鷺は乙骨の強さにも限界があり、宿儺のような「他を顧みない災い」がその先にいると告げる。一方、東京第2結界では漫画家志望のシャルルが、持ち込みを酷評した編集者を傷つけていた。創作意欲を失った彼は秤へ戦う理由を求め、挑発された末に交戦を始める。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: In the aftermath of the climactic battles in the 仙台結界 , 憂太 decides to spare 龍 and 烏鷺 . They believe he's too naïve but 憂太 is able to take their points thanks to the newest rule. Meanwhile, 秤金次 meets an aspiring mangaka in the 東京第2結界 .
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 烏鷺's description of overwhelming aggression that disregards all else like a calamity. Following the end of the battle in the 仙台結界, 憂太 talks to the defeated 烏鷺 in order to retrieve her points. She tells 憂太 that his strength has a limit and she's seen power beyond the horizon of strong fighters among sorcerers and curses with her very own eyes. She imagines 宿儺 's original form and claims that such power takes the form of overwhelming aggression that disregards anything else like a calamity. 憂太 moves on to 龍, who tells him he's too soft and that he won't receive praise for his actions. 憂太 replies that 烏鷺 also told him something similar, that there was no value in sparing an opponent's life. 龍 is surprised to learn that 烏鷺 survived and believes his blasts must've weakened after using 領域展開. 龍 sits up and asks what 烏鷺 kept getting upset about during the fight and asks if it was a lover's quarrel. 憂太 says it's something like that and 龍 tells him to stop acting like it's a bother. 憂太 explains that anything he could've said to her would've just led to violence because he's blessed. 龍 doesn't really understand what 憂太 meant but still respects his words. "Because I'm blessed." After a brief break, 憂太 decides to get back to his mission and asks 龍 to hand over his points. 龍 is initially confused but his コガネ explains that a new rule was added to the game that allows players to transfer points to one another. 龍 believes he understands why 憂太 spared their lives now and asks if he would've killed them without that rule. 憂太 suggests it was a possibility but he smiles and tells 龍 to just be grateful to his comrade. Thanks to the point transfers from 烏鷺 and 龍 on top of the points he gained from eliminating ドゥルヴ and 黒沐死 , 憂太 has now scored 190 points. Sometime before the 死滅回游 , a young man with blue hair and blue eyes named シャルル ベルナール filled out his visitor's registration at Shueisha's publishing house in 東京. Two of the staff members noticed and discussed if he brought in a manga submission. They also commented on how unusual it is for a foreigner to do so. シャルル ベルナール submitting his manga to Shueisha. シャルル ベルナール met a Shueisha staff member to review his manga submission. While improperly sitting on a desk, シャルル expressed that he's always pondered what makes a manga creator. They don't need licenses and in シャルル' opinion, experience doesn't necessarily validate a creation either. The employee looked over シャルル' manga while hardly listening to his words, wishing he would just sit in a chair. He only commented that the foreigner's Japanese is pretty good but シャルル responded by repeating the same sentiment back, confusing the man. The employee stated that's obviously the case because he's Japanese and シャルル reveals that he was born and raised in Japan although his parents are French. The employee apologized for assuming and シャルル dismissed it because he believed it would be the start of a long relationship between him and the publishing studio. シャルル meets 秤 in the 東京第2結界. The Shueisha employee is mostly unimpressed by シャルル' manga submission and critiques the story, the genre, the tone, and most of all, the artwork. He used one example of one panel where a character's finger is bent too much in one direction. The employee tries to show シャルル by sticking out how own finger, but シャルル immediately breaks it to match the manga's art. Irritated, シャルル told the man to watch movies or stare at photos if he wanted realistic artwork. He believed a publishing house should appreciate the passion that is can't be replicated in precise artwork. シャルル finishes his tirade after assaulting the employee and storms out of the building, deeming the entire experience a waste of time. " Quit your whinin' and fight me... you creepy otaku. " In the present day, it is November 12, 12:11 P.M. at present. シャルル is on a ferries wheel with 秤金次 and asks him if he knows exactly what makes someone a manga creator. Annoyed, 秤 answers that he doesn't know. シャルル is thankful there is still electricity in the area but 秤 isn't and suggests he normally wouldn't ride a Ferris wheel with a man. シャルル points out that he could've refused but 秤 wants to scope out the area in case he brings a girl back one day. シャルル is surprised 秤 believes 東京 will recover from the 死滅回游, claiming that he is the exact opposite, as someone who's only come to gaze upon the end of it all. Ever since curses flooded 東京, there haven't been outlets for manga, and creators that シャルル respected are giving up. シャルル asks 秤 to give him a reason to fight because heroes in battle manga are always fighting for positive reasons while the 死滅回游 only incites fights for negative ones. シャルル asks 秤 to provoke him enough to instill hatred to the point where he could kill. 秤 decides to oblige and thoroughly insults シャルル. He says he would never read シャルル' creepy manga because his gloomy disposition might infect him. He also tells シャルル to stop whining and to start fighting, garnering an emotional reaction. With tears in his eyes, シャルル asks why 秤 would say such mean things.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: シャルル ベルナール 烏鷺亨子 石流龍 乙骨憂太 宿儺 (回想) 三輪霞 秤金次
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 仙台結界 仙台市 東京第2結界 仙台市

transition_note: 仙台結界の戦後処理と東京第2結界導入を併記する移行回。
key_events_verified_phase10: 乙骨が烏鷺と石流から得点を譲り受け190点になる
烏鷺が宿儺を災いに例えて乙骨へ警告する
シャルルの漫画持ち込みと編集者への暴行が描かれる
秤とシャルルの戦闘が始まる
verification_notes_phase10: 集英社公式21～24巻目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別／話別資料、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第十段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
